emails.subject: Tom Martin Vacation
emails.body: Tom Martin Vacation John and Louise, I am planning to be on vacation from Thursday noon 12/20 and returning Monday 12/31. I will be in Houston the whole time and available to come in if needed to help out on Due Dilegence or other matters. I can be reached at home 281-580-6280, cell. 713-417-7994 or pager 800-503-3208. I have made arrangements for the curves to be updated daily. If you have any questions don't hesitate to call. Happy Holidays! Tom

emails.subject: RE: Tom Martin Vacation
emails.body: RE: Tom Martin Vacation no problem

emails.subject: RE: Tom Martin Vacation
emails.body: RE: Tom Martin Vacation no problem
